title: darniella glomerata
intro: Darniella glomerata, also known as the common Darniella or cluster Darniella, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory properties. Darniella glomerata is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful in managing various health conditions. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and flowers are used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves.
